JOURNEY

The path that shaped me as a developer

2023
Started with the Fundamentals
Began my dev journey with HTML, CSS, PHP and Laravel. Built my first server-rendered web apps and fell in love with building for the web.
2024
JavaScript & Modern Frameworks
Levelled up to JavaScript and its ecosystem — React, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, WebSockets, Three.js and more. Started building full-stack, real-time and 3D web experiences.
2025
AI, Blockchain & Systems
Expanded into AI and machine learning, DeFi and blockchain development, and Linux systems. Broadening across the full spectrum of modern software engineering.
2025 →
Full Stack & Open to Work
Building complete products across the stack. Actively looking for exciting collaborations and full-time roles.

Profile

Software engineer focused on long-term growth across systems, software, and modern technology. Passionate about building high-performance web applications, real-time systems, and immersive 3D experiences on the web.

Projects
RAIDER — Multiplayer Shooter
2023 · TypeScript · Node.js · WebSocket · Three.js · Express
Real-time multiplayer browser shooter with server-authoritative game loop, weapon systems, and low-latency WebSocket networking.
BL_AST — Blast Wave Simulator
2024 · TypeScript · WebGL · Three.js · GPU-compute · Vite
Real-time physics-based blast wave visualization using GPU-accelerated compute shaders and custom WebGL rendering pipeline.
PuzzleRush — Browser Puzzle Game
2023 · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · Vite · HTML5
High-performance puzzle game with optimized game loop, responsive UI, and smooth animations built entirely in the browser.
JWL — Modern Web App
2023 · JavaScript · React · Vite · CSS3
Sleek web application showcasing modern UI/UX patterns, component architecture, and responsive design principles.
Services Offered
Full Stack Web Development
End-to-end web applications from database architecture to polished frontend, including REST APIs, auth systems and cloud deployment.
3D & Real-time Experiences
Interactive 3D web experiences, multiplayer systems, and GPU-accelerated visualizations using Three.js, WebGL and WebSocket.</
